atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports injuring his right knee four days ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a popping sensation at the time of injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports significant swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty with weight-bearing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports limited range of motion

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain on flexion and extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports struggling to consistently monitor his diet

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasionally enjoying sugary foods like ice cream

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his diabetes management has been 'okay'

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The primary care physician is treating the patient's diabetes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals significant swelling in the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation elicits tenderness to the medial aspect of the patella

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a likely diagnosis of a torn or injured medial collateral ligament (MCL) of the right knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports associated swelling and pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a course of oral mobic for pain relief and to help reduce swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refills the patient's metformin prescription to maintain his current dosage

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI to evaluate the extent of the injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks to assess his progress and adjust the treatment plan as needed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is placed in a straight leg brace
